excerpt: The official programme page for Master of Design lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/73035-ibd-ibp-isd-isp-ssd-ssp-ted-tep Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: We welcome applications on a rolling basis until all available places are filled. Please note that applications submitted during the Extended Round will be reviewed based on availability, as all study places may be allocated to applicants from the Early and Main Rounds.
